name: report_fit
short_description: Run FIT estimation and display report
full_help:
report_fit

Description: 
Run FIT estimation and display report

Syntax: 
report_fit  [-alt <arg>] [-long <arg>] [-lat <arg>] [-devices <arg>]
            [-time <arg>] [-temp <arg>] [-revised_packaging_model]
            [-file <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                        Description
  ---------------------------------------
  [-alt]                      The altitude/elevation where the circuit will 
                              be deployed.  Default units are in meters.  Use
                              set_units to change.
                              Default: 0.0
  [-long]                     The longitude where the circuit will be 
                              deployed:  Range 0 to 360
                              Default: 285
  [-lat]                      The latitude where the circuit will be 
                              deployed:  Range -90 to 90
                              Default: 40
  [-devices]                  The number of devices that will be deployed in 
                              the application.
                              Default: 1
  [-time]                     The time window in which the application will 
                              be running (in months).
                              Default: 12
  [-temp]                     The junction temperature in which the device(s)
                              will be running (in degrees C):  25, 85, 100, 
                              or 125
                              Default: 25
  [-revised_packaging_model]  Use revised packaging model for FIT estimation
  [-file]                     Filename to output results to. (send output to 
                              console if -file is not used)
  [-quiet]                    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]                  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Report
